title: Pahan's crosshairs
body:
This is a set of different crosshairs that will update a small detail, the crosshair. 10 different variations to suit your taste!

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

Varieties:

| Number             | Crosshairs               | 
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| 1.            | Bold              | 
| 2.            | Aim              | 
| 3.            | Pattern              | 
| 4.           | Snowflake              | 
| 5.            | Small              | 
| 6.            | Arrow              | 
| 7. | Point | 
| 8.            | Cube              | 
| 9.           | Circle              | 
| 10.            | Cross              | 

</details>
